query:
-- 1. classroomCourses table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS classroomCourses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  externalId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,        -- Google's courseId
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  section VARCHAR(128),
  description TEXT,
  room VARCHAR(64),
  ownerName VARCHAR(128),
  enrollmentCode VARCHAR(32),
  courseState VARCHAR(32),                        -- ACTIVE | ARCHIVED | PROVISIONED | DECLINED | SUSPENDED
  alternateLink TEXT,
  subjectId INT,
  syncedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_subject (subjectId),
  INDEX idx_state (courseState)
);

-- 2. Add lifecycle + subjectId to classroomAssignments
ALTER TABLE classroomAssignments
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lifecycleStatus ENUM('to_do','in_progress','turned_in','graded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'to_do',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS subjectId INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS turnedInAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gradedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS grade VARCHAR(32),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gradeNumeric DECIMAL(6,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS driveFolderId VARCHAR(64),
  ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lifecycle (lifecycleStatus),
  ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_subject (subjectId),
  ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_due (dueAt);

-- 3. classroomSubmissions table - tracks the audit history of lifecycle changes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS classroomSubmissions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  assignmentId INT NOT NULL,
  fromStatus ENUM('to_do','in_progress','turned_in','graded'),
  toStatus ENUM('to_do','in_progress','turned_in','graded') NOT NULL,
  changedBy VARCHAR(64),                          -- 'reagan' | 'mom' | 'grandma' | 'classroom_sync' | 'auto'
  note TEXT,
  driveFileId VARCHAR(64),                        -- if a file move triggered this
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_assignment (assignmentId),
  INDEX idx_status (toStatus)
);

-- Verify
SELECT 'classroomCourses' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS rows_present FROM classroomCourses
UNION ALL
SELECT 'classroomAssignments', COUNT(*) FROM classroomAssignments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'classroomSubmissions', COUNT(*) FROM classroomSubmissions;

SHOW COLUMNS FROM classroomAssignments LIKE 'lifecycleStatus';
SHOW COLUMNS FROM classroomAssignments LIKE 'subjectId';
